mainHero.title: Making a Positive Impact with
mainHero.subtitle: AI Software
mainHero.description: At BD, we believe that technology can be a powerful tool for improving people's lives. Our team of experts is dedicated to developing cutting-edge AI software solutions that solve real-world problems and make a positive impact on people's lives. From improving healthcare outcomes to streamlining daily tasks, we're committed to helping people live better lives through technology.

primaryAction.text: See How We Can Help You

items.title: JobJa
items.description: JobJa is an AI-powered recruitment and career advancement platform designed to help users build professional, highly optimized resumes in minutes. It acts as a smart career assistant to bridge the gap between job seekers and their ideal roles.

features.title: AI Resume Analysis & Optimization
features.description: Uses advanced AI to analyze user content, provide tailored writing tips, and ensure resumes are highly compatible with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) like Greenhouse and Workday.

features.title: Smart Job Discovery
features.description: Matches users with relevant job openings and allows for seamless export to major job boards like LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor.

features.title: Comprehensive Toolset
features.description: Features drag-and-drop building, custom color themes, cover letter generation, and real-time auditing, all built on a privacy-first architecture.

items.title: ZeroG
items.description: ZeroG is a mobile educational application (available on iOS and Android) focused on optimizing the way people learn and memorize information. It is ideal for learning new languages or prepping for crucial exams.

features.title: Spaced Repetition System (SRS)
features.description: Utilizes scientifically proven spaced repetition algorithms to ensure long-term retention of information.

features.title: Gamified Learning
features.description: Combines rigorous study techniques with engaging game mechanics to keep users motivated and prevent study fatigue.

items.title: SubFlow
items.description: SubFlow is a professional-grade, privacy-centric subtitle studio that allows creators to translate, edit, and refine video subtitles using local AI processing.

features.title: 100% Private & Local Processing
features.description: Video files and data never leave the user's device. All AI processing happens directly within the browser, ensuring absolute security for sensitive content.

features.title: Advanced AI Integration
features.description: Users can plug in their own API keys for top-tier models like Google Gemini, OpenAI, or Anthropic to generate highly accurate, context-aware translations in multiple languages.

features.title: Real-Time Workflow
features.description: Offers instant subtitle previews over the video, smart refinement tools (to rephrase or shorten lines), and instant export to industry-standard formats like .SRT.

items.title: Portugal Tools Hub
items.description: Portugal Tools Hub is a comprehensive utility platform designed to simplify the financial and bureaucratic aspects of living and working in Portugal, catering to both locals and expats.

features.title: Financial & Tax Calculators
features.description: Includes highly accurate tools to calculate net salary (factoring in IRS and Social Security), estimate municipal property taxes (IMI), and plan for retirement.

features.title: Bureaucracy Management
features.description: Features a real-time NIF (tax identification number) validator and an interactive Tax Calendar to help users track important Portuguese tax deadlines and VAT obligations.

items.title: Namak
items.description: Namak is an all-in-one event management platform built to streamline the planning and execution of everything from intimate gatherings to large-scale events.

features.title: End-to-End Event Coordination
features.description: Features an intuitive interface for event creation, a smart booking system for managing capacity and waitlists, and comprehensive analytics to track attendance and revenue.

features.title: Food & Allergen Management
features.description: A standout feature that allows organizers to manage catering menus while collecting and tracking detailed allergen information, ensuring guest safety.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.description: Enables organizers to assign roles, share responsibilities, and keep the entire event team synced on a mobile-friendly platform.

features.title: Why Choose Us?
features.subtitle: Building for the Future
features.description: Our products are built on a foundation of trust, innovation, and user-centric design. We don't just build software; we craft experiences that empower individuals and businesses to achieve more.

items.name: Privacy-First Architecture
items.description: We prioritize your data security. Products like SubFlow operate entirely locally on your device, ensuring sensitive information never leaves your control.

items.name: User-Centric Design
items.description: Every interaction is crafted with the user in mind. From JobJa's intuitive resume builder to Namak's seamless event management, we make complex tasks simple.

items.name: Cross-Industry Innovation
items.description: We leverage AI to solve diverse problems across sectors—from education (ZeroG) to bureaucracy (Portugal Tools Hub), bringing fresh perspectives to old challenges.

items.name: Verified Excellence
items.description: Our solutions are rigorous and reliable. Whether it's accurate tax calculations or scientifically-backed study methods, you can trust our tools to perform.

sections.title: Open Source Contributions
sections.description: We are committed to advancing AI for the Portuguese language. Our team has built and published several key datasets, including 'portuguese-ocr-dataset' and 'portugues_ocr_dataset_full', which are widely used by the community to train AI models for reading Portuguese text.

sections.title: Model Fine-Tuning
sections.description: To improve document digitization, we actively fine-tune TrOCR (Transformer-based Optical Character Recognition) models. We have released multiple versions of 0.3B parameter models, specifically optimized to accurately extract and read Portuguese text from images.

sections.title: Applied AI Research
sections.description: We rigorously experiment with cutting-edge technologies. Our 'Spaces' such as Alpaca-LoRA and Banks demonstrate our expertise in fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and building robust AI applications.
